CVE-2012-5638.title: The setup_logging function in log.h in SANLock uses world-writabl ...
CVE-2012-5638.description: The setup_logging function in log.h in SANLock uses world-writable permissions for /var/log/sanlock.log, which allows local users to overwrite the file content or bypass intended disk-quota restrictions via standard filesystem write operations.
